name: github_set_user_copilot_space_collaborator_role
description: Set a collaborator role for a user Copilot Space (PUT /users/{username}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}/collaborators/{actor_type}/{actor_identifier}). role may be reader, writer, admin, or no_access (204 when removed). See [Set a collaborator role for a Copilot Space for a user](https://docs.github.c
